findings.title: Missing API gateway tier
findings.detail: No shared API gateway or WAF terminates external calls at the edge; callers hit individual microservices directly.

findings.title: East-west coupling
findings.detail: Unmediated east-west chatter and service-to-service JWT trust increases blast radius if any publisher ships overly broad scopes.

findings.title: Trace continuity
findings.detail: Service mesh emits spans and distributed traces; backlog item remains to enforce correlation identifiers on every egress hop.
